tools.name: gifs.getGifById
tools.description: Returns a GIF given that GIF's unique ID

tools.name: gifs.getGifsById
tools.description: A multiget version of the get GIF by ID endpoint.

tools.name: gifs.randomGif
tools.description: Returns a random GIF, limited by tag. Excluding the tag parameter will return a random GIF from the GIPHY catalog.

tools.name: gifs.searchGifs
tools.description: Search all GIPHY GIFs for a word or phrase. Punctuation will be stripped and ignored.  Use a plus or url encode for phrases. Example paul+rudd, ryan+gosling or american+psycho.

tools.name: gifs.translateGif
tools.description: The translate API draws on search, but uses the GIPHY `special sauce` to handle translating from one vocabulary to another. In this case, words and phrases to GIF

tools.name: gifs.trendingGifs
tools.description: Fetch GIFs currently trending online. Hand curated by the GIPHY editorial team.  The data returned mirrors the GIFs showcased on the GIPHY homepage. Returns 25 results by default.

tools.name: stickers.randomSticker
tools.description: Returns a random GIF, limited by tag. Excluding the tag parameter will return a random GIF from the GIPHY catalog.

tools.name: stickers.searchStickers
tools.description: Replicates the functionality and requirements of the classic GIPHY search, but returns animated stickers rather than GIFs.

tools.name: stickers.translateSticker
tools.description: The translate API draws on search, but uses the GIPHY `special sauce` to handle translating from one vocabulary to another. In this case, words and phrases to GIFs.

tools.name: stickers.trendingStickers
tools.description: Fetch Stickers currently trending online. Hand curated by the GIPHY editorial team. Returns 25 results by default.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
